attributes.action: Stop allowing US armed forces the use of UK bases and air space to attack Iran.
attributes.additional_details: The attack on Iran is illegal under international law, there is no evidence of any threat to the US or Israel that justifies the attacks. Any claim that allowing the use of UK bases is in some way "defensive" is wrong.  Attacks on UK allies in the Middle East is a result of attacks by the US and Israel, facilitating US attacks on Iran increases their probability.
attributes.background: Deny permission to the US and Israel to perform any actions in UK controlled territory related to the prosecution of their undeclared war with Iran.  Do not provide UK intelligence to assist them in the war. Pursue an end to the war and negotiations.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
